title: Pope Leo decries ‘tyrants’ ravaging world, days after insults from Trump
summary_full: The pontiff did not name the president during a speech in Cameroon. He criticized those who manipulate religion “for their own military, economic or political gain.”
summary_public: The pontiff did not name the president during a speech in Cameroon. He criticized those who manipulate religion “for their own military, economic or political gain.”
